creator: scottl@FreeBSD.org
text:
In the 'Select Drive(s)' menu, the available drives are listed with a checkbox next to each, and an Ok/Cancel button pair at the bottom.  With the old behavior, the checkboxes were toggled with the space bar, and the Ok/Cancel buttons were activated with the return key.  Now, when the Ok button is highlighted, the space and return keys toggle the checkbox, with no apparent way to activate the Ok button.  The only way to continue from this menu is to select the Cancel button and press either return or space.

How-To-Repeat: Run sysinstall.  Select the Standard installation option.  The Select Drives menu comes up.  Notice that there is no way to activate the Ok button
